headline: American Tower (AMT) Upgraded to Outperform at RBC Capital
summary: With an annual dividend yield of 3.98%, American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is included among the 12 Best NYSE Stocks to Buy for Dividends. American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) is a Fortune 500, S&P 500, and Forbes Global 2000 company that provides the infrastructure for modern digital communications. headline: American Tower (AMT) Stock After 24% Slide Is The Market Overreacting To Rate Fears
summary: If you are wondering whether American Tower stock offers value after a rough patch, it helps to separate short term noise from what the current price is really implying. The share price closed at US$163.57, with returns declining 8.8% over the past week, 12.5% over the past month and 24.3% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about risk and potential opportunity. Recent commentary around American Tower has focused on its role as a large cell tower and infrastructure owner and...
